title: In the initial block, variable declaration results in a syntax error
body:
Considering the design below, I have minimized it. I declare variables within the initial block, but it gives a syntax error.

The output is:

```
iverilog -g2005-sv t.v 
t.v:4: syntax error
I give up.
```

```verilog
module fifo_manager();
    initial begin   
      logic [7:0] data;
    end
endmodule
```
